item.title: Why things feel off lately
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Action steps for dropping into the un-easiness of your life in these totally new conditions. The take-away here is to know your true nature, free from distractions. Something is stealing your attention, your memory… and maybe even your sense of self. And no one’s really talking about it.

item.title: Ferske spor: June 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichman music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Kiasmos - Sisteron (Sisteron, 2025) Minimal, atmospheric electronica. Has an ethereal and contemplative soundscape that helps make this song both intimate and grand. Here, Kiasmos manages to deliver a song that is slightly hypnotic, with enough organic warmth. Cercle · Kiasmos - Sisteron Nym - Ten thousand smokes (False noon, 2023) A journey through a kaleidoscope of sound. Spacious and dreamlike song from Nym, which delivers a pure and sensual experience.

item.title: Xochipilli in temicxoch
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Xochipilli , the Aztec god of beauty, youth, love, passion, sex, sexuality, fertility, arts, song, music, dance, painting, writing, games, playfulness, nature, vegetation, and flowers, is here depicted in a state referred to as temicxoch, or “dream flowers,” which symbolizes an entheogenic experience. This state is associated with the ingestion of psychoactive plants and fungi, such as mushrooms, tobacco, and ololiuhqui seeds. Its head is tilted up, eyes open, jaw tensed, and mouth half open, a typical expression of ecstasy.
